drifted.actual: namespace_id intentionally removed from Extent and ExtentMetadata. Clients create one ExtentManager per namespace/device pair.

drifted.spec_text: Iteration MUST hold an exclusive lock that blocks concurrent create and remove
drifted.actual: get_extents() uses read lock (state.read()). Writers are blocked by RwLock but multiple readers can iterate concurrently.

drifted.spec_text: Valid size classes range from 128 KiB to 5 MiB and must be multiples of 4 KiB
drifted.actual: No validation of extent_size in create_extent. Any u32 value accepted. Slab size validation is correct.

drifted.spec_text: System MUST support fresh initialization AND reopening an existing volume
drifted.actual: open() intentionally removed. No reopen/recovery capability. Only fresh initialization supported.

drifted.spec_text: Superblock at block 0 with magic, format version, slab table, CRC-32
drifted.actual: superblock.rs deleted. Initialization is purely in-memory. No on-disk superblock.
--ns-id used only for block device capacity queries. initialize() no longer takes namespace_id.

drifted.spec_text: Wire full component stack including Logger to all components
drifted.actual: Logger binding to extent manager not visible in main.rs.

conflicts.description: 001 FR-003 references namespace_id in metadata, but it was intentionally removed from the API.
001 FR-012 requires open() for reopening volumes, but open() and crash recovery were intentionally removed.
002 FR-003 references --ns-id for extent manager init, but initialize() no longer takes namespace_id.
